overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a player walking through a snowy mountain wilderness. The player encounters NPCs walking on the trail and survives a wolf attack while traversing the winter landscape with snow-covered trees, rocky terrain, and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with scattered pine trees

events.description: encounter a couple walking toward the camera on the trail
pass the couple and continue forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered trail through the open wilderness

notable_agents.action: couple walking together toward the camera, then passing by on the left

entered.detail: snow-covered dirt path winding through the mountain landscape
tall pine trees covered in snow on the left hillside
scattered trees and bushes on the right side of the trail
distant snow-capped mountains visible under partly cloudy sky
rocky outcropping and boulders on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wide-open snowy mountain trail with distant peaks visible. A couple approaches from the distance, passes by on the left, and continues down the trail. The landscape features snow-covered pine trees and rocky terrain on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail approaching denser forest

events.description: encounter a man in a top hat walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, approaching a solitary figure in the distance

notable_agents.action: man wearing a black top hat and beige coat walking toward the camera

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the snowy trail as the rocky hillside draws closer on the left. A man in distinctive attire including a top hat approaches from ahead, passes by, and the player continues toward a denser forested area.

scene_state.functional_zone: denser forest trail with wolf encounter

events.description: pack of wolves appears on the trail ahead
wolves attack the player, blood splatters on the snow

agents.ego_description: engaging in close combat with wolves that ambush on the trail

notable_agents.action: pack of wolves attacking the player character, lunging and biting

segments.scene_description: Entering a denser forested area with thicker tree cover, the player encounters a pack of wolves on the trail. The wolves attack, resulting in blood splattered on the snow, before the player continues past the encounter site.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense snowy forest with ancient stone ruins

events.description: ancient stone ruins come into view on the left side of the trail
encounter a woman in a long dress walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense forest past stone ruins and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: woman in a long dark dress and hat walking toward the camera on the trail

entered.detail: ancient stone monoliths and crumbling ruins on the left side of the path
weathered wooden signpost on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The player traverses a narrow, densely forested section of the trail where ancient stone ruins emerge on the left. After passing the ruins, the player encounters a woman in period clothing walking toward them, passes her by a wooden signpost, and continues deeper into the snowy woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a snowy mountain trail that transitions from wide-open vistas into a dense, perilous woodland. It begins on an expansive path flanked by distant peaks and snow-covered pines, where a couple passes by on the left. As the camera moves forward, the rocky hillside draws closer and a man in a top hat approaches from ahead before the trail narrows and enters a thick forest. The scene then shifts into a violent encounter with a pack of wolves that leaves blood splattered across the white snow, which the camera eventually moves past to reveal ancient stone ruins emerging from the trees. Finally, the path leads past a wooden signpost and a woman in period clothing as the camera pushes deeper into the secluded, snowy woodland.
